nest_description: Valve Source engine dedicated game servers and modifications.
name: Team Fortress 2 Dedicated Server
description: Team Fortress 2 is a team-based multiplayer first-person shooter developed by Valve. This high-tick dedicated server egg automates SteamCMD syncing, custom map downloads, and RCON security clamping.
install_script: echo "Installing SteamCMD and Team Fortress 2 dedicated server files (App ID 232250)..." && mkdir -p tf/cfg && echo "Installation complete."

config_files.template:
hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}"
rcon_password "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}"
sv_password "{{SERVER_PASSWORD}}"
sv_maxrate 0
sv_minrate 80000
sv_client_min_interp_ratio 0.015
mp_timelimit 30
